details: Quotation for 1000 high-quality food kits (each containing 5kg Rice, 1kg Dal, 1L Cooking Oil). Price includes delivery to specified NGO warehouse within 10 business days. Payment terms: 50% advance, 50% upon delivery.
Proposal for 1000 standard food kits (each containing 5kg Rice, 1kg Dal, 1L Cooking Oil). Price includes logistics to main distribution hub. Payment terms: Net 30 days upon delivery and inspection.

Offer for 1000 ethically sourced food kits (each containing 5kg Rice, 1kg Dal, 1L Cooking Oil). Includes robust, moisture-resistant packaging ideal for field distribution. Delivery within 14 days. Flexible payment terms available for NGOs.

Comprehensive package includes high-quality printing for 3 banners (3x6ft), 5 standees (roll-up), and 2000 pamphlets (A5, double-sided, full color). Also includes 150 durable school bags with NGO logo. Price covers basic graphic design support, standard delivery within 10 business days, and a 1-year product warranty on bags. Payment terms: 50% upfront, 50% upon delivery.

Quote for 3 banners (3x6ft), 5 standees (roll-up), 1500 pamphlets (A5, gloss finish), and 175 standard school bags with single-color NGO branding. Includes free delivery to one location and a 6-month material defect warranty. Lead time: 12-15 business days. Special NGO bulk discount applied.

Premium quotation for eco-friendly materials: 2 PVC-free banners (3x7ft), 4 recyclable material standees, 2500 pamphlets (recycled paper, A5, full color), and 160 ergonomic school bags made from sustainable fabric with multi-color NGO branding. Includes expedited delivery (8 business days), dedicated account manager, and post-delivery support. Requires 60% advance payment.

Quote for 1000 units of 'TechPro S500' business laptops (Intel i5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 14-inch FHD). Includes standard 1-year manufacturer warranty, free ground delivery within 30 days to main hub. Volume discount applied. Price excludes local taxes.

Quotation for 1000 units of 'EIT Workstation Pro' laptops (AMD Ryzen 5, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, 15.6-inch FHD). Includes extended 2-year business warranty, expedited freight delivery (15-20 days). Payment terms: 50% upfront, 50% upon delivery. Pre-configuration services available at additional cost.

Proposal for 1000 units of 'DHI Performance Series' laptops (Intel i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB NVMe SSD, 14-inch QHD). Includes 3-year full parts and labor warranty with 1-year on-site support. Delivery within 4 weeks. Offer includes basic asset tagging and imaging with provided software.

Quotation includes 1000 units of Dell Latitude 3000 series equivalent laptops (i5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD) with 1-year manufacturer's warranty, and 100 boxes of Kitkat. Pricing includes standard delivery to your specified location within 3 weeks.

This offer covers 1000 units of HP ProBook series equivalent laptops (i5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD) with an extended 2-year warranty. Also includes 100 boxes of Kitkat. Bulk discount has been applied. Standard delivery within 4 weeks.

Proposal for 1000 units of Lenovo ThinkPad E-series equivalent laptops (i5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD) with 1-year warranty. Includes free basic software pre-installation service and 100 boxes of Kitkat. Delivery within 3-5 weeks.

Quotation for 10,000 condoms at $0.22/unit ($2,200) and 5,000 birth pill packs at $12.50/pack ($62,500). Includes standard ground delivery (7-10 business days) and a 1-year product warranty. Payment terms: Net 30 days. Quote valid for 30 days.

Quotation for 10,000 condoms at $0.19/unit ($1,900) and 5,000 birth pill packs at $11.00/pack ($55,000). Prices are Ex-Works; shipping costs are an additional estimate of $950 depending on final destination. Bulk discount applied. Payment terms: 50% upfront, 50% upon delivery. Quote valid for 20 days.

Quotation for 10,000 condoms at $0.25/unit ($2,500) and 5,000 birth pill packs at $14.00/pack ($70,000). Includes expedited delivery (3-5 business days) and an extended 2-year product warranty. Dedicated support for order tracking. Payment terms: Net 45 days. Quote valid for 45 days.
Standard quality products (School Bags, Notebooks, Pens, Pencils, Erasers, Sharpeners). Includes local delivery to one address and 30-day product warranty. Basic packaging materials are included.

High-grade school bags and durable stationery (Notebooks, Pens, Pencils, Erasers, Sharpeners). Includes nationwide door-to-door delivery, reinforced packaging for individual kits, and 60-day extended warranty.

Cost-effective solutions for all listed items. Prices are ex-warehouse; basic local delivery can be arranged at an additional cost of $400. Includes basic bulk packaging. 14-day warranty on manufacturing defects.

Comprehensive package including 200 educational books, 10 custom vinyl banners, and 3 certified skill teachers for a 2-month part-time program (40 hours/teacher). Includes delivery, setup assistance for banners, and basic teacher coordination.

Premium procurement solution for 200 academic books, 10 high-durability fabric banners, and 3 expert skill trainers for a 3-month part-time engagement (60 hours/teacher). Includes global sourcing, expedited delivery, and dedicated project management.

Budget-friendly package with 150 essential reading books, 8 standard outdoor banners, and 2 local skill facilitators for a 6-week part-time program (30 hours/teacher). Includes local delivery and basic support.
